Lumify

Lumify – Code Documentation

Welcome to the technical code reference for Lumify.

This documentation is generated directly from the source code (DocFX for the .NET backend, TypeDoc for the Next.js frontend) and filled with content from the doc comments in the code.

Contents

  • Backend Reference (API) – ASP.NET Core, EF Core, SignalR hubs
  • Frontend Reference (App) – Next.js / React / TypeScript (coming soon)
  • Technical Documentation (Extended) – architecture & interaction (coming soon)

Stack

Area Technology
Backend ASP.NET Core (.NET 10), EF Core, SignalR
Database MariaDB (Pomelo EF provider)
Frontend Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind
Tests xUnit
Made with docfx
